channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lime Bikes Obstructing Pavement and Blocking Safe Pedestrian Access, 17th July
item.description:
There are numerous Lime hire bikes left obstructing the pavement at this location, making it difficult for pedestrians to pass safely. As shown in the attached photo, the bikes occupy a substantial portion of the footway, forcing people to navigate around them and potentially into unsafe positions. This is particularly problematic for wheelchair users, parents with pushchairs, visually impaired pedestrians, and anyone with reduced mobility, who may be unable to pass without entering the road. This is not an isolated issue. Similar complaints have been widely reported in the press and by disability organisations across London and other UK cities, highlighting the safety and accessibility problems caused by dockless hire bikes being left on pavements. Local authorities have repeatedly raised concerns that poorly parked rental bikes create unnecessary barriers and can breach the requirement to keep footways clear for all users. I request that Lime remove these obstructing bikes as soon as possible and take steps to ensure this location does not become a regular dumping point. The pavement should remain clear and accessible for everyone.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 166, Old Brompton Road, South Kensington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress on the road, 17th July
item.description:
Somebody left a mattress on the road

item.title: Ilegal constuction, 17th July
item.description:
The neighbor at number 10 has made an extension to the kitchen, blocking access to the yard behind the house. I live and pay taxes at number 12 Monkton Road. That space is shared and must be respected, as long as I drive my car behind the house, please take action.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Exeter Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Red Builders Cone needs removing in Killewarren Road, 17th July
item.description:
Cone needs removing in Killewarren Road behind the road sign on left as entering the road many thx

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Killewarren Way, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Large branches fallen on grass verge in Chelsfield Road, 17th July
item.description:
Large branches have either fallen off off someone has put them there x needs removing on grass verge in Chelsfield Road opposite house number 42 sorry didn’t know what category to place this under

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Chelsfield Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In front of 8 Longford Street, junction of Triton Square, 17th July
item.description:
Located outside 8 longford street. At the junction with triton square. Lampost has broken last week. Only the base remains. Street is unlit at night.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Longford Street, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken food waste bins left in street, 17th July
item.description:
These broken food bins have been here for a few weeks with no takers

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shakspeare Walk, Hackney, London

item.title: Excessive black bin bags across the pavement, 17th July
item.description:
There are overturned bins and an excessive number of black bin bags across the pavement. It smells and there are a number of flies. I'm not sure why this wasn't collected.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 17th July
item.description:
This car has been dumped and abandoned for a couple of weeks now. It has no tax, no mot and no insurance. It is now being vandalised

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wellan Close, Blackfen, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned bikes along station frontage, 17th July

item.title: People keep fly tipping rubbish from the balcony’s and missing the bin, 17th July
item.description:
People keep fly tipping rubbish from the balcony’s and missing the bin spilling their houseware which includes food it’s NASTY there are babies living in this building and it’s causing excessive flies and rats. there should be a fine for people who fly tip

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Down Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on the street for days, 17th July
item.description:
We have bugs and animals coming in the house and bad smell because of the litter on the floor in this heat. Can you come clean it?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Boleyn Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Siding / guttering Flytipped on Wingfield Street near Maxted Road, 17th July
item.description:
Hello - It appears that some siding or guttering has been Flytipped on Wingfield Street near the corner of Maxted Road. This is a frequent flytipping location, so I would appreciate it if this could be resolved promptly before it attracts more rubbish. Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Wingfield Street, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bbq in park every weekend, 17th July
item.description:
Bbq and loud music in lark

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): John Ruskin Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa and boxes flytipped out of a white renault van, 17th July
item.description:
The van arrived at 14:56 , and left 15:01. A man was seen going out of the van and looking for a place to dump their load. The driver backed in and they were there for 4-5 minutes. Can be seen running away to the van and speeding off immediately after. Drove out to London Road at around 15:01. I have a few videos showing the van drive in and out but cant make out the plate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parsonage Road, South Stifford, Grays
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: High risk for kids - motorcycles flying through plaza, 17th July
item.description:
This is a residential plaza with fountains where children regularly play. Delivery motorcycles are passing through the area non-stop, creating a serious safety risk. Access for motorcycles should be physically blocked as soon as possible.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet
